utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 items are present. Each item is fully specified with both what is covered and the associated costs. Health coverage includes physical and mental health, stress management, etc., with a cost specified (€950/month). Property coverage details what is covered and ties into the same cost. Travel coverage lists detailed protections and includes the cost. Additional services are listed with their features and cost inclusion. The total_budget provides a full monetary breakdown. Therefore, all 5 items are included and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan describes a comprehensive €950/month package including physical and mental health coverage, high-value property insurance, global travel coverage, and executive-level additional services. Based on the ground-truth ratings, the most fitting health coverage options are the 'EliteCare Premium Plan' and 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' (both rated 10) for both physical and mental health. The property coverage aligns with 'EliteHome Premium Coverage' (rating 10). The travel coverage corresponds to 'EliteTravel Premium Plan' (rating 10). For the additional executive services such as concierge, global assistance, and priority claims, the closest match is 'Premium Insurance Membership' (rating 10). Therefore, all items correspond to the highest-rated premium options.

final_package_text:
{
    "health_coverage": "Comprehensive physical and mental health insurance with stress management programs, cardiovascular monitoring, severe allergy coverage, executive health programs, preventive care, prescription coverage, and family therapy - included in €950/month comprehensive package",
    "property_coverage": "High-value property insurance covering luxury items, business equipment, electronics, art, jewelry, liability protection, temporary accommodation, and natural disaster coverage - included in €950/month comprehensive package", 
    "travel_coverage": "Executive global travel insurance with medical evacuation, business travel protection, trip cancellation, baggage protection, travel delay compensation, emergency coordination, and English-speaking medical network - included in €950/month comprehensive package",
    "additional_services": "Executive liability protection, concierge services, dedicated agent, priority claims processing, 24/7 customer support, global assistance, emergency coordination, multilingual support, mobile app access - included in €950/month comprehensive package",
    "total_budget": "€950/month (€11,400 annually) representing €500/month savings (€6,000 annual savings) from current €1,450/month spending - 34% cost reduction with superior coverage across all insurance types"
}
